title: Research Fellow (Food Science & Technology)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal

Your application will be processed only if you apply via NUS Career Portal

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

The successful candidate will work with Professor Zhou Weibiao on  food structure and functionality, food material characterization, food shelf-life evaluation and modeling under a project on shelf-life extension of tropical fruits.


The main responsibilities of the position include:

  • The candidate shall join a multidisciplinary team at NUS making efforts to develop advanced technology that increases the shelf-life of tropical fruits. The team comprises experts on business for market analysis and on technology involving food science & engineering.  Areas of relevance specifically for this position include food structure and functionality, food material characterization, food shelf-life evaluation and modeling (chemical, physical and microbial).    

In addition, he/she will help supervise final year undergraduate projects as well as MSc projects.

Qualifications

PhD in Food Science, Food Technology, or a closely related field from an internationally reputable university.

Skills:

  • Strong wet laboratory and analytical skills
  • Demonstrated capability of independent researcher
  • Good team player
  • Good scientific writing skills

Experience:

Research experience with good track record, including:

  • publications in top peer-reviewed SCI-indexed journals in the relevant field, 
  • mentoring undergraduate and postgraduate student projects, 
  • lab safety and maintenance, 
  • research grant management,
  • working experience in a cross-disciplinary team,
  • experience in research on tropical fruits that are unique to the Southeast Asia region.


Working experience with food structure and modelling is highly desirable.

postedCompany.description:
The National University of Singapore aspires to be a vital community of academics, researchers, staff, students and alumni working together in a spirit of innovation and enterprise for a better world.

 

Our singular focus on talent will be the cornerstone of a truly great university that is dedicated to quality education, influential research and visionary enterprise, in service of country and society.
